---
name: Deployment Intake
about: Capture rollout requirements for team or hosted deployment
title: '[Deployment] '
labels: deployment-intake
assignees: jtalk22
---

## Deployment Goal
What outcome do you need from this rollout?

## Runtime Target
- [ ] Local stdio (Claude Desktop/Code)
- [ ] Local web mode
- [ ] Hosted HTTP transport
- [ ] Worker/Smithery distribution

## Team Profile
- Team size: [1 / 2-5 / 6-20 / 20+]
- Number of workspaces: [single / multiple]
- Primary region/timezone:

## Security and Operations Constraints
- Credential handling preference: [ephemeral only / persistent env / undecided]
- Logging constraints:
- Data retention constraints:
- Compliance requirements (if any):

## Expected Usage
- Estimated daily requests:
- Peak concurrency expectation:
- Critical workflows (search, thread access, sends, exports):

## Timeline and Risk
- Target start date:
- Urgency: [low / medium / high]
- Rollback requirement:

## Support Expectations
- Preferred support level: [docs only / guided setup / active rollout support]
- Desired response window:

## Validation Plan
How will you determine deployment success? Include concrete checks.
